menu.page.general.title: General Settings
menu.page.general.tooltip: Changes to the vanilla game to enhance multiplayer gameplay like starter cabins, buildings or items.
menu.page.farms.title: Customize Farms
menu.page.farms.tooltip: Lets you customize or disable/enable the additional farms. Please keep in mind that disabling or enabling farms requires a save restart.
menu.page.harmony.title: Other Patches
menu.page.harmony.tooltip: Allows you to disable/enable harmony patches, if you are running into issues its probably because of these.
menu.general.section.title: General Options (Requires World Restart)
menu.general.section.tooltip:
Basic gameplay options.
These options only take effect before creating or joining a new world.
menu.farms.section.title: Farm Settings (Requires World/Game Restart)
menu.farms.section.tooltip:
Where you can disable/enable or customize farm types as well as the warp exit coordinates.
These options only take effect before loading a save, and if you are adding or 
changing a custom farm type it is recommended you restart the whole game.
menu.harmony.section.title: Harmony Patches (Requires Restart)
menu.harmony.section.tooltip:
The following patches directly change base game code and require restarting the client for them to be enabled/disabled.
Only need to disable this if they are causing you issues (for example if you are using a mod that modifies Return Scepter behavior).
option.freeCabins.name: Free Cabins
option.freeCabins.tooltip: Allows you to purchase cabins at Robin for 0g.
option.starterCabins.name: Starter Cabins
option.starterCabins.tooltip:
Generates pre-built cabins on all farms. 
Note: using a custom farm will disable starter cabins, please go to Robin.
option.starterItems.name: Starter Items
option.starterItems.tooltip:
Generates crates on each farm with themed starter items. 
Note: using a custom farm will disable crates.
option.starterBuilds.name: Starter Buildings
option.starterBuilds.tooltip:
Enables pre-built buildings on:
 - Wilderness (Slime Hutch)
 - Meadowlands (Coop with 2 chickens).
 Note: using a custom farm will disable starter buildings.
option.enable.name: Enable
option.farmName.name: Name
option.direction.name: Direction
option.direction.tooltip:
Choose the warp direction for {{label}}. 

[WIP] Feature, only works on Farm 7
option.farmType.name: Type
option.farmType.tooltip: Pick a built-in or custom farm.
option.returnScepter.name: Return Scepter Fix
option.returnScepter.tooltip: Modifies Return Scepter to allow farmhands warp to their cabins built on additional farms.
option.farmTotem.name: Farm Totem Fix
option.farmTotem.tooltip: Modifies Farm Totem to allow farmhands warp to their cabins built on additional farms.
option.lightningRod.name: Lightning Rod Fix
option.lightningRod.tooltip: Modifies Lightning Rods to be able to generate batteries on additional farms.
option.miniObelisks.name: Mini Obelisks Fix
option.miniObelisks.tooltip: Modifies Mini Obelisks to be able to be placed on additional farms.
option.fixTrees.name: Fix Trees
option.fixTrees.tooltip: Fixes the issue of trees spawning/growing very often.
option.fixEvents.name: Fix Events [WIP]
option.fixEvents.tooltip: Remove every event tied to the main farm so that it can later be replace with custom events that take into account every additional farm, expect missing translations.
option.fixFestivals.name: Fix Festivals
option.fixFestivals.tooltip: Modifies default festival end warp location and coordinates for custom farms.
